news.cmenIntro: Studio notes for players, makers, and future game development updates.
news.edenIntro: Updates from the learning network, prepared for future admin publishing.

aria.lock: Lock current day or night mode
aria.unlock: Unlock automatic day and night switching

directory.title: Members
directory.description: Choose a member node to open the GitHub-powered profile panel.

profile.fallbackBio: Builder of CMENStudio and EDEN, shaping game-facing systems with code, math, and a few odd experiments.

state.githubUnavailable: GitHub profile data is temporarily unavailable.

focus.label: Focus
focus.value: Game web systems and learning networks

repos.title: GitHub Projects
repos.description: Pulled from the selected public GitHub profile. These slots can become real studio members later.
repos.noDescription: No description yet, but the console light is on.
repos.empty: Repository data is waiting for GitHub to answer.

state.errorMessage: Unable to load repository data. Please try again later.

features.title: Technical Features
features.angular: Single Page Application (SPA) support provides smooth page transitions without a full page reload.
features.flask: A lightweight Python framework with a clean, extensible design for RESTful APIs and web services.
features.postgresql: A powerful open-source relational database known for reliability, scalability, and advanced features.
features.docker: A tool that packages an app and its required environment into lightweight containers for fast deployment and cross-platform execution.
features.pwa: PWA makes web applications feel closer to native mobile apps in experience and capability. Setup instructions are available on the tutorial page.

hero.title: Build a WPA Shortcut
hero.lead: Follow the six-step install path and turn the website into a desktop-style app experience.

steps.title: Six Steps
steps.description: Use the highlighted controls in each screenshot to add the app to the desktop launcher.

openMenu.title: Open Browser Menu
openMenu.detail: Tap the highlighted browser menu button to find install options.

chooseAdd.title: Choose Add
chooseAdd.detail: Select the add-to-home or install action from the browser sheet.

confirmInstall.title: Confirm Install
confirmInstall.detail: Review the app name and confirm the desktop installation.

finishSetup.title: Finish Setup
finishSetup.detail: Let the browser create the app shortcut and window mode.

findIcon.title: Find the Icon
findIcon.detail: The app icon appears on the device desktop or launcher.

launchApp.title: Launch as App
launchApp.detail: Open the shortcut to use the website as a desktop-style app.
